name: atl
description: Read, mirror, edit, validate, and push Confluence pages and Jira issues with atl

interface.shortDescription: Confluence and Jira workflows for coding agents
interface.longDescription: Use typed read-only MCP tools for bounded evidence, or the atl CLI to mirror Confluence pages and Jira issues, edit native formats, and push deliberate changes under version and safety checks.
defaultPrompt: Use atl to search Confluence and Jira for context.
Set up atl for Confluence and Jira access.
Use atl to update a Confluence page safely.
